laws.title: Complex Sign-In Process
laws.description: The sign-in process involves multiple steps and can be confusing.
laws.remediation: Streamline the sign-in process to reduce the number of steps and simplify user interactions.

laws.title: Confusing Navigation
laws.description: Users find it difficult to locate certain sections due to complex navigation structure.
laws.remediation: Simplify the navigation structure and include a clear, concise menu layout.

laws.title: Subscription Management
laws.description: Managing subscriptions is not intuitive for users.
laws.remediation: Redesign the subscription management interface for ease of use and clarity.

laws.title: Delayed Feedback on Actions
laws.description: Actions like clicking on a video or button lack immediate feedback.
laws.remediation: Implement loading indicators or transitional animations to provide feedback.

laws.title: Overwhelming Recommendation System
laws.description: Users feel overwhelmed by the volume of recommendations provided.
laws.remediation: Refine the recommendation algorithm to personalize and reduce the clutter.
